summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FitAI MVP. All core features working correctly including landing page, onboarding flow, backend APIs, and saved looks functionality.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/ returns correct FitAI message
Backend API /api/saved-looks GET returns empty array initially
Backend API /api/saved-looks POST creates new saved look successfully
Backend API /api/saved-looks DELETE removes saved look successfully
Landing page loads with correct headline 'Wear what you own. Look like yourself.'
Try it now button navigates to /onboarding correctly
Onboarding step 1: Self photo upload area works and accepts images
Onboarding step 2: Clothing upload grid shows and accepts multiple images
Onboarding step 3: Vibe text input works and accepts user input
Style me button appears enabled when all inputs are provided
Saved looks page shows correct empty state message
Color scheme matches design specifications (sage green #7C9E7E, off-white #FAFAF8)
